title.description: Document title. Use the literal string NOT_FOUND if absent from the source.

doc_number.description: Document number/identifier, verbatim from source. NOT_FOUND if absent.

revision.description: Revision/version, verbatim from source. NOT_FOUND if absent.

site.description: Site/mine/location this SOP applies to. NOT_FOUND if absent.

effective_date.description: Effective/issue date, verbatim. NOT_FOUND if absent.

review_date.description: Next review date, verbatim. NOT_FOUND if absent.

purpose.description: Purpose of the procedure. May be lightly drafted from source content but must not introduce facts not in the source. NOT_FOUND if no basis in source.

scope.description: Scope / who and what this applies to. NOT_FOUND if no basis in source.

definitions.description: Terms and definitions found in the source. Empty array if none.

responsibilities.description: Roles and their duties. Empty array if none in source.

ppe_requirements.description: Required PPE items, verbatim from source. SAFETY-CRITICAL: never invent. Empty array if none stated.

procedure_steps.description: Ordered procedure steps. SAFETY-CRITICAL: content must come from the source; do not invent steps.

warning.description: Warning/caution attached to this step, verbatim. Empty string if none.

hazards.description: Hazards and controls stated in the source. SAFETY-CRITICAL: never invent hazards or controls.

risk_level.description: Risk level/rating as stated in source. NOT_FOUND if not stated.

references.description: Referenced standards, legislation, and documents, verbatim. Empty array if none.

field_confidence.description: One entry per document field (dot-path, e.g. document.purpose).

note.description: Why confidence is below high. Empty string when high.

not_found.description: Dot-paths of fields that were NOT_FOUND in the source.

warnings.description: Anything the human reviewer must check (ambiguities, conflicts in source, possible OCR issues).
